fixes.feedback_comments:
I was searching for remodels at store 100 and you searched for projects with store in the title.

✓ Filters Applied:
Search: store

history.title: User Feedback: Sparky AI
history.feedback_comments:
I asked for something in East Division, and it searched for Division. Then I reworded my question and it worked it filtered for East, but it didn't remove the Search word Division, so it showed 0. I guess when someone used chat it needs to clear the filters before it moves to the next chat. 

Here is the context of the chat. You: I'm looking for projects in East division 😊 Sparky: 🔍 **Found 1 projects matching 'DIVISION':** • Cost Inventory \| Division 1 Test - Hawaii 📊 **Total:** 9 stores across these projects 💡 **Tip:** Type a specific project name for more details. ✓ Filters Applied: Search: division You: I'm looking for projects in the East 😊 Sparky: 📍 **Filtering to EAST Division** ✅ Found 82 projects impacting 18765 stores 🎯 Dashboard filtered! 💡 Would you like to narrow this down by WM WK? ✓ Filters Applied: Division: EAST
history.root_cause: User reported issue in category 'Sparky AI'. Manual analysis required to determine specific root cause.
history.resolution: Review feedback comments and any attached context. Reach out to user if clarification needed.

history.title: UI/Visual Issue
history.feedback_comments:
I asked for a remodel at 5147, but Sparky wasn't able to show anything. 

Maybe it could show any Realty Remodels or Initiatives with Remodel in them for 5147. If it had none then maybe just say this is what we are showing for 5147.

You: remodel 5147
😊 Sparky: 👋 **Hi! I'm Sparky!** 📊 I have access to **100000 active projects** across thousands of stores in BigQuery. 🎯 **Quick actions:** • **Search projects:** Just type a project name (e.g., `GMD`, `Sidekick`) • **Search by owner:** `projects owned by Mike` or `owner: John` • **Get stats:** Type `summary` or `statistics` • **Get help:** Type `help` for full command list 💡 **Example queries:** • `Show me Sidekick projects` • `POC projects in EAST` • `Projects owned by Mike` • `Give me a summary` What would you like to explore?
